headline: Warren Buffett Won't Be The Central Figure At Saturday's Berkshire Hathaway Annual Meeting: Will Investors Warm Up To Greg Abel?
summary: The annual Berkshire Hathaway shareholder meeting takes place in Nebraska on May 2, 2026. Warren Buffett steps back from leading the meeting.
